disclaimer: TransitLens ranks astrophysical interpretations for follow-up. It does not independently confirm exoplanets. Performance varies with signal-to-noise, stellar variability, contamination, cadence gaps, and the availability of spatial diagnostics.

restricted_classifier.title: Restricted calibrated classifier
restricted_classifier.limitation: Feature-level blind benchmark with incomplete spatial coverage; production_eligible=false.

injection_recovery.title: Synthetic injection and control benchmark
injection_recovery.limitation: Synthetic injections and noise-only controls are not a real-TESS population estimate.

real_tess_pilot.title: Real-TESS end-to-end pilot
real_tess_pilot.limitation: Nine selected targets constitute a pilot, not a blind sector-scale performance claim.

ingestion_scale.title: Verified ingestion scale
ingestion_scale.limitation: Parsing success measures ingestion only; it is not end-to-end detection or classification performance.
